Author: n0xolotl
Content:
hey, im nox. ive been playing on this server for over 4 years, and i do hold this place very close to my heart.  something unique about 50x is that there is a special place for banned members, along with a secret command to go there. (dm me for further info.) i wish for you to bring back the original 50void, the one with the slimefun mod and the special sea lantern floor. you might not know what im talking about, but this place was one of the truly most important place to me. I spent weeks grinding in the void, and it would be amazing if we could bring that back. If you are interested in this, feel free to send me a dm. I remember most of the exact things inside it, so i would be open to collaborate. 
Peace, your local voidling, n0xolotl.
